notes: Solid, complete Asteroids implementation with proper wrapping, saucer AI, hyperspace, lives, waves, and high score — minor quirk with Down/S hyperspace overloading thrust key but otherwise well-executed.
Excellent implementation with toroidal collision and wrapping, though movement physics are slightly frame-rate dependent.
A solid and mostly complete Asteroids clone with correct core mechanics and presentation, but scoring/life progression and some gameplay tuning/edge-case behavior keep it from feeling fully polished.
